findings.description: Charts are completely missing and rendered as disconnected text strings.
findings.evidence: On the PDF, there are two distinct charts (Figure 38.1 line chart and Figure 38.2 bar chart). In the HTML, these graphical elements are entirely absent. Instead, the HTML displays a list of disconnected text labels extracted from the charts (like axis values '$0', '$20', years '1990 1991', etc.) as plain text paragraphs, completely losing the visual data representation.

findings.description: Missing charts from the final page
findings.evidence: The PDF contains two line graphs on page 5 ('Figure 38.1' and 'Figure 38.2'). These are completely missing as visual elements ( tags) in the HTML.

Instead of representing the charts appropriately, the HTML dumps raw, unformatted OCR data and artifact characters from the chart data layer into standard paragraph tags. Example: '

64,691,006,000 ########## ########## ########## ########## ########## ########## ########## ########## ###### ###### ###### ###### ###### ######

' and '

-0.67% -1.01% 3.25% 7.72% 9.55% 10.97% 12.43% 15.10% 4.20% 8.13% 1.77% 2.87% ###### 4.26% 5.60%

'.
